name: QA 1670
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1685

pmlogrewrite extensions to accommodate amdgpu PMDA evolution

(fixing bad PMNS)



valgrind variant, see qa/1559 for the non-valgrind variant



check-group-include: pmlogrewrite pmda.amdgpu other



Copyright (c) 2026 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1685

pmlogrewrite extensions to accommodate amdgpu PMDA evolution

(fixing bad PMNS)

valgrind variant, see qa/1559 for the non-valgrind variant

check-group-include: pmlogrewrite pmda.amdgpu other

Copyright (c) 2026 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.
